title: Definitions under Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022
content:
(v) Labor Code - Presidential Decree No. 442, as amended.

(w) License - refers to the document issued by the Secretary of Labor and Employment authorizing a person, partnership or corporation to operate a private recruitment/manning agency.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
